StatusPage.title: Check Request Status
StatusPage.subtitle: Enter your details to look up your request

form.title: Information for Verification
form.desc: We use this information to securely find your request.

id.label: Thai National ID or Passport Number
id.placeholder: Thai ID (13 digits) or Passport No.

help.mixed: Enter Thai National ID (13 digits) or Passport No.
help.empty: Enter Thai National ID (13 digits) or Passport No.

phone.label: Last 4 digits of phone number
phone.help: Enter only the last 4 digits used when filing the request.

StatusPage.pdpa: Your data is used only to verify your request and is protected under PDPA.

err.fillAll: Please enter Thai ID/Passport and the last 4 digits of your phone number.
err.needId: Please provide Thai ID or Passport number.
err.badShape: Invalid response format. Please try again.
err.incomplete: Incomplete request data. Please try again.
err.badToken: Invalid verification data. Please try again.

errors.invalidOrExpired: The link is invalid or has expired.

notfound.title: Request not found
notfound.r1: The link you used is invalid or has expired.
notfound.r2: The request has been removed or cannot be found.
notfound.r4: The request may have been cancelled or rejected.
notfound.hint: Please verify the link from LINE and try again. If issues persist, go back to the status page and enter your details again, or contact staff.

ios.saveHint: iOS: After downloading a video, tap the download icon → Share → Save Video.
ios.saveHintLong: iOS (Safari): After downloading a video, tap the download icon (top-right) → Share → Save Video.

media.title: Media from CCTV
media.emptyDesc: Files will be available once the document is reviewed and approved by staff.

external.title: Open in browser
external.desc: You are opening this link from LINE which doesn’t fully support downloading. Please copy the URL below and open in Safari/Chrome.
external.copydone: URL copied! Open Safari/Chrome and paste the URL.
external.copymanual: Please copy this URL and open in Safari/Chrome:
external.howto:
📱 How to:
1) Tap “Copy URL”
2) Leave LINE and open Safari/Chrome
3) Paste the URL

hero.title: Submit CCTV Footage Request
hero.subtitle: Provide detailed incident information to help officers locate footage quickly

address.title: Applicant Address
address.description: Specify address for contact and identity verification

incident.title: Request & Incident Details
incident.description: Specify request type, date/time, and location as clearly as possible

view.title: View Footage
view.description: Request to view CCTV footage during the incident period for preliminary investigation

copy.title: Request Footage Copy
copy.description: Request copy of CCTV footage files for legal evidence or court proceedings

location.label: Incident Location
location.placeholder: e.g. intersection in front of market

details.label: Additional Details
details.hint: Recommended: landmarks, vehicle make, license plate

documents.label: Supporting Documents
documents.idCard: Copy of Thai ID Card/Government Official ID
documents.otherPlaceholder: e.g. Driver's License copy, Receipt copy, Other documents

review.title: Review Information Before Confirmation
review.description: Please verify accuracy. Click “Back” if you need to make changes.

consent.title: Consent under Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA)
consent.summary: I consent to the agency collecting, using, and/or disclosing personal data as necessary to receive and consider the request and follow up in accordance with applicable laws.
consent.details: The agency will process data for the purposes of receiving requests, investigating and monitoring incidents, verifying and confirming identity, communicating, notifying results, recording as official evidence, and preparing internal statistics/reports, using appropriate data security measures, and retaining data for the period required by law or as necessary.

success.title: Request Submitted Successfully
success.message: Please wait for document approval. The video and image links will be sent to you automatically via LINE.
success.bullet1: Our staff will review your request and supporting documents
success.bullet2: Once approved, the system will deliver the result directly to your LINE account
success.bullet3: You can also track the status anytime on the request status page
success.attachmentWarning: Your request has been saved, but some attachments failed to upload. Please contact our staff for assistance.
success.hint: Please keep the request ID for status tracking

errors.required: Please complete all required information before proceeding
errors.submitFailed: Failed to submit request. Please try again

validation.ageNumber: Age must be a number only
validation.documents: Please select at least one supporting document and provide details for other documents if selected
validation.consent: Must accept terms before submitting request

placeholders.id: Enter Thai ID or Passport number
placeholders.otherDetails: e.g. Driver's License copy, Receipt copy, Other documents

hero.title: Contact Channels
hero.description: Please use the information below for contacting to request information, complaints, suggestions, or coordinate government affairs

contact.title: Primary Contact Information
contact.description: Main channels for contacting the organization

fields.lineOAHint: Click to open LINE OA chat

hours.title: Operating Hours
hours.description: Government working hours and service channels outside working hours

pdpa.title: Personal Data Protection (PDPA)
pdpa.description: The information you provide is used only for contact and service according to the request. The organization will store and use the data according to personal data protection principles

accessibility.title: Accessibility for All
accessibility.description: The building has ramps and elevators for wheelchair users. If you need special assistance, please inform the staff before entering the service

map.title: Map
map.description: Organization location (click the button to open in map app)

org.name: Hua Hin City Municipality
org.unit: 3rd Floor, Peace and Security Coordination Center
org.address: 114 Petchkasem Road, Hua Hin Sub-district, Hua Hin District, Prachuap Khiri Khan Province 77110

success.title: Request Submitted Successfully!
success.subtitle: Your request has been recorded successfully
success.connectNotification: Connect to receive notifications when documents are approved
success.lineAccountName: Hua Hin City Municipality CCTV Official
success.scanQrDescription: Scan QR Code to add friend and track your request status
success.benefit2: Inquire for additional information: Mon-Fri 08:30-16:30, Sat-Sun 08:00-16:00
success.footerNote: For additional questions, please contact Tel. 032-511-047 Ext. 310 or via LINE Official Account

success.title: Request Linked Successfully
success.description: Your request has been linked to your LINE account.
success.alreadyLinkedDescription: Your request has already been linked to your LINE account.
success.notifyItem3: There is additional information from staff
success.lineConfirmTitle: LINE OA will send a confirmation message
success.lineConfirmHint: Please check the message in our LINE Official Account
success.autoCloseHint: This page will close automatically in {seconds} seconds
